mapper.insert: insert into listening_test ( title, audio_url, total_score, audio_object_key, transcript_text, created_time, is_deleted ) values ( #{title}, #{audioUrl}, #{totalScore}, #{audioObjectKey}, #{transcriptText}, #{createdTime}, 0 )
mapper.select: select id, title, audio_url, total_score, audio_object_key, transcript_text, created_time, is_deleted from listening_test where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select id, title, audio_url, total_score, audio_object_key, transcript_text, created_time, is_deleted from listening_test where id = #{id}
select id, title, audio_url, total_score, audio_object_key, transcript_text, created_time, is_deleted from listening_test where is_deleted = 0 order by id desc
select id, title, audio_url, total_score, audio_object_key, transcript_text, created_time, is_deleted from listening_test where is_deleted = 1 order by id desc
select id, title, audio_url, total_score, audio_object_key, transcript_text, created_time, is_deleted from listening_test order by id desc
mapper.update: update listening_test set title = #{title}, audio_url = #{audioUrl}, total_score = #{totalScore}, audio_object_key = #{audioObjectKey}, transcript_text = #{transcriptText} where id = #{id}
update listening_test set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update listening_test set is_deleted = 0 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
